description.description: Detailed explanation of the policy's purpose and scope

metadata.description: Metadata information like version and category of the policy

mode.description: Execution mode for the policy, indicating its operational context

parameters.description: Configurable parameters for the policy definition

policy_rule.description: Logical rule defining the conditions and actions of the policy

policy_type.description: Classification of the policy, such as built-in or custom

role_definition_ids.description: List of role IDs associated with the policy for permissions
